channel.title: yorkindependntlife TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from yorkindependntlife

item.title: 🎨 Unveiling The Art of Wallpaper: Morris & Co. Exhibition! Mark your calendars! From 27th September 2024 to 23rd February 2025, York Art Gallery @yorkartgallery is thrilled to present The Art of Wallpaper: Morris & Co. @wmorrisandco celebrating the timele
item.description: 🎨 Unveiling The Art of Wallpaper: Morris & Co. Exhibition! Mark your calendars! From 27th September 2024 to 23rd February 2025, York Art Gallery @yorkartgallery is thrilled to present The Art of Wallpaper: Morris & Co. @wmorrisandco celebrating the timele

item.title: 🌮 Batanga – York’s Hidden Mexican Gem! 🍹 📍9 Franklins Yard, York YO1 9TA @batangayork may be tiny, but it packs a BIG punch! With fresh, flavorful dishes and genuinely friendly service, it’s the perfect spot for Mexican food lovers. 🇲🇽 Their menu has all
item.description: 🌮 Batanga – York’s Hidden Mexican Gem! 🍹 📍9 Franklins Yard, York YO1 9TA @batangayork may be tiny, but it packs a BIG punch! With fresh, flavorful dishes and genuinely friendly service, it’s the perfect spot for Mexican food lovers. 🇲🇽 Their menu has all

item.title: A new brunch spot in York… 🥞🥓 @fathippofood are now serving up ‘burg-fest’, a new breakfast/ brunch menu served 9-11:30am everyday! There’s huge American pancake stacks, fat breakfast sandwiches with bacon and sausage and of course, a range of their delic
item.description: A new brunch spot in York… 🥞🥓 @fathippofood are now serving up ‘burg-fest’, a new breakfast/ brunch menu served 9-11:30am everyday! There’s huge American pancake stacks, fat breakfast sandwiches with bacon and sausage and of course, a range of their delic

item.title: So long, Summer ☀️ We headed around town this week to check out some of best sunny spots to get the last of the Summer rays. Where’s your favourite place to soak up the sun? ☀️ Save and share with friends! [York, sun, summer, drinks, friends]
item.description: So long, Summer ☀️ We headed around town this week to check out some of best sunny spots to get the last of the Summer rays. Where’s your favourite place to soak up the sun? ☀️ Save and share with friends! [York, sun, summer, drinks, friends]

item.title: 👻 Ghosts have taken over York! We went on a hunt to find the Ghosts in the Museum Gardens! 45 breathtaking translucent ghost sculptures have mysteriously appeared around the city. Crafted from fine wire mesh by @unconventionaldesignyork these ghostly figu
item.description: 👻 Ghosts have taken over York! We went on a hunt to find the Ghosts in the Museum Gardens! 45 breathtaking translucent ghost sculptures have mysteriously appeared around the city. Crafted from fine wire mesh by @unconventionaldesignyork these ghostly figu

item.title: Happy 1st October 🍁🍂🎃👻 @crumblesdesserts have launched their new autumn special, Pumpkin Spiced Crumble ✨🤩 Spiced pumpkin, crumble, hot custard, whipped cream, pumpkin seeds and pumpkin spice- tastes like Autumn in a dessert! 🏃🏼‍♀️🏃‍♂️💨 Don’t forget to sa
item.description: Happy 1st October 🍁🍂🎃👻 @crumblesdesserts have launched their new autumn special, Pumpkin Spiced Crumble ✨🤩 Spiced pumpkin, crumble, hot custard, whipped cream, pumpkin seeds and pumpkin spice- tastes like Autumn in a dessert! 🏃🏼‍♀️🏃‍♂️💨 Don’t forget to sa

item.title: WHAT’S ON YORK: WEEKEND EDITION ❤️ 🗓️SATURDAY, 12TH OCTOBER 🎃 PYO RAG PUMPKIN YO31 7UU @ragpumpkins @redgoatwall AT 10AM 🥰 WHAT’S LOVE GOT TO DO WITH IT? YO10 4NT @yorkbarbican AT 7:30PM 🎓 THE STUDENT AND GRADUATE RUNWAY SHOW YO1 7EW @yorkfashionweek
item.description: WHAT’S ON YORK: WEEKEND EDITION ❤️  🗓️SATURDAY, 12TH OCTOBER  🎃 PYO RAG PUMPKIN YO31 7UU @ragpumpkins @redgoatwall AT 10AM  🥰 WHAT’S LOVE GOT TO DO WITH IT? YO10 4NT @yorkbarbican AT 7:30PM  🎓 THE STUDENT AND GRADUATE RUNWAY SHOW YO1 7EW @yorkfashionweek

item.title: YORK LATEST Discover What’s What in York this season! 🍁 Our October/November edition is here, with the amazing illustration by @allantadams. It is packed with all the autumnal vibes you need to cosy up with! Whether it’s the newest restaurants, cafes, or
item.description: YORK LATEST Discover What’s What in York this season! 🍁 Our October/November edition is here, with the amazing illustration by @allantadams. It is packed with all the autumnal vibes you need to cosy up with! Whether it’s the newest restaurants, cafes, or

item.title: 🍁 Autumn Specials at The Savvy Baker! Get ready to embrace the cozy vibes this season with @thesavvybaker_ autumnal drinks! Choose from: 🫐 Blueberry Iced Matcha 🧇 Stroop Waffle Latte 💚 White Chocolate & Pistachio Latte 🔥 S’mores Hot Chocolate 🍁 Maple Spi
item.description: 🍁 Autumn Specials at The Savvy Baker! Get ready to embrace the cozy vibes this season with @thesavvybaker_ autumnal drinks! Choose from: 🫐 Blueberry Iced Matcha 🧇 Stroop Waffle Latte 💚 White Chocolate & Pistachio Latte 🔥 S’mores Hot Chocolate 🍁 Maple Spi

item.title: Autumn has arrived at @sparkyorkcic 🍁🍂🍺 We spent our Wednesday night at Spark’s Quingo night- think bingo mixed with a quiz- admiring their new autumn decor ready for Oktoberfest! 🍻 Quingo will be taking place every week for two rounds of general knowledg
item.description: Autumn has arrived at @sparkyorkcic 🍁🍂🍺 We spent our Wednesday night at Spark’s Quingo night- think bingo mixed with a quiz- admiring their new autumn decor ready for Oktoberfest! 🍻 Quingo will be taking place every week for two rounds of general knowledg

item.title: Have you tried this new York bakery yet?! 🥐🧡 @heppnibakeri opened on Swinegate earlier this year. India has worked in local, independent bakeries all her life and decided to take a leap and open her own, dream bakery 😍 Serving freshly made pastries and ca
item.description: Have you tried this new York bakery yet?! 🥐🧡 @heppnibakeri opened on Swinegate earlier this year. India has worked in local, independent bakeries all her life and decided to take a leap and open her own, dream bakery 😍 Serving freshly made pastries and ca

item.title: New Autumn specials at @doebakehouse 🍩😍 We headed down to Doe Bakehouse to check out their new Autumn specials- there’s Hot Chocolate, Sticky Toffee, Chocolate & Cinnamon and filled Custard! Our favourites were the hot chocolate and sticky toffee as both
item.description: New Autumn specials at @doebakehouse 🍩😍 We headed down to Doe Bakehouse to check out their new Autumn specials- there’s Hot Chocolate, Sticky Toffee, Chocolate & Cinnamon and filled Custard! Our favourites were the hot chocolate and sticky toffee as both

item.title: Pasta lovers, this one’s for you! 🍝✨ Sunday Kitchen at @luciarestaurants is serving up pasta-making classes on the first Sunday of every month, where you can master Italian classics and take your cooking skills to the next level! 👩‍🍳 We had an incredible
item.description: Pasta lovers, this one’s for you! 🍝✨ Sunday Kitchen at @luciarestaurants is serving up pasta-making classes on the first Sunday of every month, where you can master Italian classics and take your cooking skills to the next level! 👩‍🍳 We had an incredible

item.title: WHAT’S ON YORK: WEEKEND EDITION ❤️ 🗓️ SATURDAY, 19TH OCTOBER 🍁 COUNTRY MUSE: THE RUNWAY YO1 7HE @femmecountrymagazine AT 7:00PM 🎭 LOL COMEDY CLUB YO1 9QL @cityscreenyork AT 7:30PM ♣️ BEN PORTSMOUTH: THIS IS ELVIS YO10 4NT @yorkbarbican AT 7:30PM 🕺🏻 UP
item.description: WHAT’S ON YORK: WEEKEND EDITION ❤️ 🗓️ SATURDAY, 19TH OCTOBER  🍁 COUNTRY MUSE: THE RUNWAY YO1 7HE @femmecountrymagazine AT 7:00PM  🎭 LOL COMEDY CLUB YO1 9QL @cityscreenyork AT 7:30PM  ♣️ BEN PORTSMOUTH: THIS IS ELVIS YO10 4NT @yorkbarbican AT 7:30PM  🕺🏻 UP

item.title: We LOVE Autumn 😍🍂🍁🫶🏼 York is starting to look very autumnal so we had a stroll around and captured some of our favourite Autumn corners/ shop fronts, which are all looking stunning! What’s your favourite Autumnal spot in York? Let us know in the comments
item.description: We LOVE Autumn 😍🍂🍁🫶🏼 York is starting to look very autumnal so we had a stroll around and captured some of our favourite Autumn corners/ shop fronts, which are all looking stunning!  What’s your favourite Autumnal spot in York? Let us know in the comments

item.title: As gift season approaches we thought we’d put together a few of our favourite places to buy gifts in York to give you lots of inspiration! @imaginariumyork- 📍6 Blake Street, YO1 8QG - lifestyle store selling unique decor pieces as well as candles, perfum
item.description: As gift season approaches we thought we’d put together a few of our favourite places to buy gifts in York to give you lots of inspiration! @imaginariumyork- 📍6 Blake Street, YO1 8QG - lifestyle store selling unique decor pieces as well as candles, perfum

item.title: York has lots of unique independent clothing shops so we thought we’d put together a few of our favourite places to buy clothes in York to give you inspiration to shop local! 🛍️👚 @dogandbonevintage is York’s one stop vintage, retro, fashion and lifestyle
item.description: York has lots of unique independent clothing shops so we thought we’d put together a few of our favourite places to buy clothes in York to give you inspiration to shop local! 🛍️👚 @dogandbonevintage is York’s one stop vintage, retro, fashion and lifestyle

item.title: Start your day right with breakfast at @thebluebarbakan 🍳✨ 📍34 Fossgate, York YO1 9TA Nestled in York’s historic Fossgate, Blue Barbakan brings Eastern European flavours with a unique twist to every dish, all made fresh in-house 🥐🇵🇱 This charming spot has
item.description: Start your day right with breakfast at @thebluebarbakan 🍳✨ 📍34 Fossgate, York YO1 9TA Nestled in York’s historic Fossgate, Blue Barbakan brings Eastern European flavours with a unique twist to every dish, all made fresh in-house 🥐🇵🇱 This charming spot has

item.title: ork has lots of independent gems, including these 3 beautiful plant shops! @wigginton_road_nurseries is located on The Shambles market, they sell a gorgeous range of seasonal flowers and plants, and right now they have a beautiful range of pumpkins! 💐 @b
item.description: ork has lots of independent gems, including these 3 beautiful plant shops! @wigginton_road_nurseries is located on The Shambles market, they sell a gorgeous range of seasonal flowers and plants, and right now they have a beautiful range of pumpkins! 💐 @b

item.title: As part 1 was so popular we decided to make a part 2 of our favourite places to buy gifts in York to give you lots of inspiration for the Christmas season! 🐈‍ @catgalleryyork is an independent, quirky gift shop selling a wide range of cat themed gifts, a
item.description: As part 1 was so popular we decided to make a part 2 of our favourite places to buy gifts in York to give you lots of inspiration for the Christmas season! 🐈‍ @catgalleryyork is an independent, quirky gift shop selling a wide range of cat themed gifts, a

item.title: Cookie stacked hot chocolate at York Christmas Markets 🎄☕😍 @chocolate.circus.york is taking loaded hot chocolates to a whole other level with these cookie loaded hot chocolates! A @bethbakescakes chocolate chip cookie topped with toasted marshmallow place
item.description: Cookie stacked hot chocolate at York Christmas Markets 🎄☕😍 @chocolate.circus.york is taking loaded hot chocolates to a whole other level with these cookie loaded hot chocolates! A @bethbakescakes chocolate chip cookie topped with toasted marshmallow place

item.title: Hot desserts and waffle dogs … @sparkyorkcic has a very delicious new pop up! 🤩 @the_waffle_dog_co has opened in Spark bringing a range of delicious hot desserts. With 6 delicious options to choose from there’s, of course, Apple Crumble, Bakewell Bramble,
item.description: Hot desserts and waffle dogs … @sparkyorkcic has a very delicious new pop up! 🤩 @the_waffle_dog_co has opened in Spark bringing a range of delicious hot desserts. With 6 delicious options to choose from there’s, of course, Apple Crumble, Bakewell Bramble,

item.title: Hello, November! 🍂✨ November is here, bringing all the cozy vibes to York! 🍁 From exploring the Shambles, cosying up with coffee from @la_bottega_milanese to indulging in a warm crumble at @sparkyorkcic @the_waffle_dog_co , it’s the perfect time to embrac
item.description: Hello, November! 🍂✨ November is here, bringing all the cozy vibes to York! 🍁 From exploring the Shambles, cosying up with coffee from @la_bottega_milanese to indulging in a warm crumble at @sparkyorkcic @the_waffle_dog_co , it’s the perfect time to embrac

item.title: York Christmas Markets are back 🤩☃️🎄 Festive season has begun… York Christmas Market kicked off yesterday with a bang and you don’t want to miss them this year! There’s of course the return favourites like @crumblesdesserts, @millersyork , @shambleskitche
item.description: York Christmas Markets are back 🤩☃️🎄 Festive season has begun… York Christmas Market kicked off yesterday with a bang and you don’t want to miss them this year! There’s of course the return favourites like @crumblesdesserts, @millersyork , @shambleskitche

item.title: York has some beautiful art galleries, and with gift season upon us we thought now would be a good time to shine the spotlight on some of them! 🎨🖼️ @pyramid.gallery.y located on Stonegate, Pyramid Gallery is a unique space selling original artwork, glass
item.description: York has some beautiful art galleries, and with gift season upon us we thought now would be a good time to shine the spotlight on some of them! 🎨🖼️ @pyramid.gallery.y located on Stonegate, Pyramid Gallery is a unique space selling original artwork, glass

item.title: Happy Chinese New Year 🎉 The Year of the Snake 🐍 Today the main Chinese New Year celebrations started with a concert at The Grand with traditional dance outside at 12.30pm then onto York Minster at 1.30pm, where lions, dragons, and costumed figures will t
item.description: Happy Chinese New Year 🎉 The Year of the Snake 🐍 Today the main Chinese New Year celebrations started with a concert at The Grand with traditional dance outside at 12.30pm then onto York Minster at 1.30pm, where lions, dragons, and costumed figures will t

item.title: Hello, February 💗 The first signs of spring will soon be starting to peak through as colour and life returns to the streets of York! 🌷 There is love all around as some of our favourite independents decorate for Valentine’s day and new events bring the buz
item.description: Hello, February 💗 The first signs of spring will soon be starting to peak through as colour and life returns to the streets of York! 🌷 There is love all around as some of our favourite independents decorate for Valentine’s day and new events bring the buz

item.title: Lunch at Lucia! 🍝 @luciarestaurants truly does it best! 🌺 Whether you’re popping in for a quick bite or trying classic Italian dishes, their menu has something for every craving. From brunch to all-day dining, they’ve got you covered! Plus, the restaurant
item.description: Lunch at Lucia! 🍝 @luciarestaurants truly does it best! 🌺 Whether you’re popping in for a quick bite or trying classic Italian dishes, their menu has something for every craving. From brunch to all-day dining, they’ve got you covered! Plus, the restaurant

item.title: Brunch at Hideaway Kitchen 🍽️ Nestled in the heart of Boroughbridge, @hideaway.kitchen is a local favourite, open 7 days a week! Their café menu is packed with delicious brunch and lunch options, plus exciting weekly specials that’ll keep you coming back
item.description: Brunch at Hideaway Kitchen 🍽️ Nestled in the heart of Boroughbridge, @hideaway.kitchen is a local favourite, open 7 days a week! Their café menu is packed with delicious brunch and lunch options, plus exciting weekly specials that’ll keep you coming back

item.title: If eggs on toast in many forms are your thing, you might want to check out these brunch spots… Some you might have heard of, some tucked away in suburbs, here are three must visit brunch spots that are at the top of our list this spring. 😋 🍳 Phill Ya Boo
item.description: If eggs on toast in many forms are your thing, you might want to check out these brunch spots… Some you might have heard of, some tucked away in suburbs, here are three must visit brunch spots that are at the top of our list this spring. 😋 🍳 Phill Ya Boo
